outbound_strategy.reply_style: Short, genuine compliments about specific visual elements (lighting, color palette, composition). Use engagement-bait questions sparingly ('this is stunning — what tool did you use?'). Keep replies to 1-2 sentences, never generic. Match the casual but appreciative tone of top EN performers.

ab_test.variant_a: Minimal caption (1-5 words, question or provocative statement, e.g. 'wifey material?') inspired by leahyunaxo/yuumispm viral pattern
ab_test.variant_b: Descriptive caption (1-2 sentences describing the image concept and style)

key_insights: EN market avg reply-adjusted engagement rate is 4.8% across 26 competitors — significantly higher than JP (0.44%). The top 3 EN performers (sessypuuh 38.0%, yuumispm 25.9%, leahyunaxo 8.4%) all post at low frequency (0.7-3.2/day), confirming quality-over-quantity remains the dominant strategy

Viral EN content pattern is now clear from trending posts: leahyunaxo's 'wifey material?' post earned 35,928 likes and 'am I attractive?' earned 16,243 likes — ultra-short question captions paired with high-quality AI images drive algorithmic distribution. New A/B test targets this pattern directly with 'minimal caption' vs 'descriptive caption' variants

90.2% of competitors (37/41) use zero hashtags — the hashtag-free approach dominates among top performers. Reducing max_per_post from 4 to 3 aligns with this signal while maintaining discoverability for a growing account. Previous A/B test on posting frequency (3 vs 4 posts/day, started 2026-03-03) has completed its 3-day minimum — shifting to caption style test

Fashion category weight increased from 20% to 25% based on Angelwithcakee (4.5% ER at 1.2/day) and marylivbrown (2.8% ER at 1.2/day) demonstrating consistent fashion-category engagement without high volume — an underexploited category compared to saturated portrait content

Newly discovered high-follower accounts from keyword search (NotoriousLad2 115K, Jinzo1993 118K, milkydream69 58K) suggest expanding engagement network beyond the current 5 targets could accelerate visibility in the AI beauty hashtag ecosystem
risks: EN market is dominated by accounts with 50K-1.2M followers — breaking through requires sustained visual differentiation and community engagement over weeks. Switching A/B test variables after only 3 days may lose statistical significance if previous test results are inconclusive

Impression-based engagement (4.9%) exceeds follower-based (4.8%) slightly, suggesting healthy algorithmic reach, but IvoryLane_plus outlier (15.84 impression ER) skews the average — rely on follower-based metrics for strategic comparisons until impression data stabilizes

outbound_strategy.reply_style: Warm, community-oriented Japanese — use polite casual tone (ですます混じり), 1-2 emoji max, and compliment specific details (色使い、構図、雰囲気). Reference the artwork theme or technique. Keep replies genuine and brief (1-2 sentences). Match the supportive peer tone of the JP AI art community.

key_insights: JP top performers by reply-adjusted engagement: ai_hyk (1.8% adjusted ER, 124K followers, 1.4 posts/day) and yunaelegant (1.1% adjusted ER, 20K followers, 2.5 posts/day) both post at moderate frequency with zero hashtags — quality visual content drives JP engagement, not volume or tags

Reply contamination is extreme in JP — 8 of 17 JP competitors have >50% reply rate (hakoirikumatan 100%, 2nd_karen_AI 100%, Shizuku_AItuber 100%, tororo_223 90%, nene__chandayo 90%). Previous target tororo_223's apparent low engagement (0.06% raw) was misleading; reply-adjusted rate is 0.52%. Switching outbound targets to accounts with cleaner engagement signals: ai_hyk, yunaelegant, AIart_yama94, AI_Girls_Studio

JP impression-based engagement (8.8%) far exceeds follower-based (0.44%), indicating strong algorithmic distribution for quality content. This gap is larger than EN (4.9% vs 4.8%), suggesting JP algorithm heavily rewards visual content even from smaller accounts — focus on image quality over follower count

Fashion weight increased from 20% to 25% and character decreased from 10% to remain at 10% — AIart_yama94 (0.95% adjusted ER, uses #SFW #Fictional #digitalart) is one of only 4 accounts using hashtags, and their artistic/fashion blend performs well. Testing whether fashion-forward JP content can differentiate from the dominant anime-illustration style

Previous hashtag_count A/B test (3 vs 5 hashtags, started 2026-03-03) ran for 3 days. Resetting with refined variants (2 vs 4 hashtags) since 90.2% of competitors use zero hashtags — testing whether any hashtags help a growing JP account vs minimal use matching top performer behavior
risks: JP engagement ceiling remains lower than EN — best JP performers reach 1-2% adjusted ER vs EN's 25-38%. Set realistic targets: aim for 0.5%+ adjusted ER in the first month before optimizing for follower growth

Heavy anime/illustration preference in JP means photorealistic AI beauty content competes in a different aesthetic lane — monitor category performance closely and be prepared to shift content_mix toward artistic/illustration style if portrait underperforms after 7 days
